title: AN ACT REPEALING PROCLAMATION NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN, DATED SEPTEMBER EIGHTEEN, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-THREE, OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 552 / 61 OG No. 13, 1813 (March 29, 1965)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4113, June 20, 1964 ]

AN ACT REPEALING PROCLAMATION NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN, DATED SEPTEMBER EIGHTEEN, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND FIFTY-THREE, OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Proclamation Numbered Four hundred eleven dated September eighteen, nineteen hundred and fifty-three' of the President of the Philippines is hereby repealed.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1964.
